## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Ambient and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: 46 engaged sessions, 10% increase in sessions, 83% increase in engaged sessions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Content pipeline: 9 articles published, 4 pending approval, aiming for 4 weeks of approved ideas (15 new ideas coming)](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Strategy adjustments: Refining approach to technical topics, incorporating industry reports, and balancing top/bottom funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [46 engaged sessions across 9 launched pages](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [10% increase in sessions, 83% increase in engaged sessions compared to previous week](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Volatility in impressions expected; focus on engaged sessions as quality indicator](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - ["8 ways to strengthen school safety with AI gun detection" article had strong initial performance](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

### Content Pipeline and Approval Process

  - [9 articles published, 4 ideas pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Aiming for 4 weeks of approved ideas (≈20 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [15 new ideas to be submitted for approval this week](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Everest can efficiently approve ideas, but content approval more time-intensive](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Some ideas (e.g., edge computing) require revision before moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Balancing technical accuracy with broad appeal (e.g., edge computing article)](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Exploring training-related content as potential bottom-funnel strategy](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Incorporating insights from customer user group meeting](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Leveraging reputable sources: SIA website, FBI reports, industry publications](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Mixing long-tail keywords with high-volume topics for SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Developing writing guidelines based on Everest's feedback to streamline future content creation](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Setting up Slack alerts for real-time publishing notifications](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Weekly summary report to be provided (ideas approved, drafts shared, articles published)](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

### Content Review and Revisions

  - [Hospital article revised to focus on "proactive threat detection" instead of "gun detection"](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Image added without title as requested](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Everest to review updated hospital article and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Everest to review revised hospital article and pending content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [GrowthX team to submit batch of 15 new content ideas for approval](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Set up Slack automation for real-time publishing notifications (Sydney to coordinate with Yosef)](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [GrowthX team to continue refining content based on feedback and develop writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Provide weekly summary report of content pipeline progress](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Explore incorporation of FBI report and other industry sources into future content](https://fathom.video/share/h-DHqxmsjmx1_-Bv3uNAyLDKvtz4f3-4?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
